name: Order created
description: Order record is created from POS, app, marketplace, WhatsApp, or API.

name: Quick drop order created
description: Quick drop bag is accepted before full itemization.

name: Preparation required
description: Quick drop or incomplete order requires itemization.

name: Order prepared
description: Items are itemized and order is ready for processing.

name: Processing started
description: Order enters processing workflow.

name: Order ready
description: Order is ready for pickup or delivery after QA and packing gates.

name: Order delayed
description: Ready-by time is at risk or missed.

name: Order cancelled
description: Order is cancelled by staff, customer, or policy.

name: Order closed
description: Order is financially and operationally closed.

name: Order priority changed
description: Priority is changed by authorized user.

name: Split order created
description: Parent order is split into child/sub-order.

name: Order issue created
description: Issue-to-solve is created before or after delivery.

name: Order issue resolved
description: Issue-to-solve is resolved.

name: Order item added
description: Item is added to order during intake or preparation.

name: Order item removed
description: Item is removed from order with audit.

name: Order item missing
description: Expected scanned item is missing during assembly or QA.
default_recipients: QA, Branch Manager, Customer if policy requires

name: Order item damaged
description: Damage is recorded for a garment or piece.

name: Item rework required
description: QA rejects item and sends it back for reprocessing.

name: Preparation task created
description: Task is created for quick drop itemization.

name: Preparation task completed
description: All required preparation is done.

name: Processing step completed
description: Sorting, pretreatment, washing, drying, or finishing step is completed.

name: Assembly started
description: Assembly task starts for expected pieces.

name: Assembly exception
description: Missing, wrong, damaged, or extra item is detected.

name: Assembly completed
description: All expected items are assembled.

name: QA started
description: Quality assurance inspection is started.

name: QA passed
description: Order or item passed quality assurance.
default_recipients: Packing Staff, Customer if policy requires

name: QA failed
description: Order or item failed QA.
default_recipients: Processing Staff, Branch Manager, Customer if policy requires

name: Packing completed
description: Packing list and packaging profile are completed.

name: Pickup scheduled
description: Customer schedules pickup.

name: Pickup reminder
description: Reminder before pickup time.

name: Pickup driver assigned
description: Driver is assigned for pickup.

name: Pickup completed
description: Pickup proof is captured.

name: Delivery assigned
description: Driver receives delivery task.

name: Out for delivery
description: Order leaves branch or plant.

name: Delivery OTP generated
description: OTP is generated for proof of delivery.

name: Driver arrived
description: Driver is at customer location.

name: Delivery failed
description: Delivery attempt failed due to absence, wrong address, or other issue.

name: Delivered
description: Delivery proof is captured.

name: Collected
description: Customer collected order from branch.

name: Payment requested
description: Payment request link or amount is issued.

name: Payment received
description: Payment or voucher is successfully recorded.

name: Payment failed
description: Gateway, card, wallet, or manual payment failed.

name: Partial payment received
description: Partial payment is recorded.

name: Payment collection due
description: Pay-on-collection amount is outstanding.

name: Refund requested
description: Refund request is created.

name: Refund approved
description: Refund is approved by authorized role.

name: Refund rejected
description: Refund is rejected with reason.

name: Refund processed
description: Refund is sent to gateway, wallet, cash, or voucher.

name: Invoice issued
description: Tax invoice or AR invoice is issued.

name: Invoice cancelled
description: Invoice is cancelled/voided according to policy.

name: Credit note issued
description: Credit note is issued for reversal/refund.

name: Statement generated
description: B2B or customer statement is generated.

name: Statement overdue
description: Statement due date is passed.

name: Stub customer created
description: POS creates minimal customer profile.

name: Customer upgraded
description: Stub becomes full app profile after OTP.

name: Customer profile updated
description: Customer updates profile, address, or preference.

name: Loyalty points added
description: Points are earned after eligible order/payment.

name: Loyalty points redeemed
description: Customer uses points.

name: Loyalty tier changed
description: Customer moves to new loyalty tier.

name: Wallet top-up
description: Wallet receives balance.

name: Wallet debited
description: Wallet is used to pay or adjust.

name: Gift card issued
description: Gift card code is generated or sold.

name: Gift card activated
description: Gift card becomes usable.

name: Membership started
description: Customer membership/subscription starts.

name: Membership renewal due
description: Renewal date approaches.

name: Membership expired
description: Membership benefits expire.

name: Staff task assigned
description: Task is assigned to role/user.

name: Shift started
description: Staff clock-in or shift starts.

name: Attendance exception
description: Late, missing check-out, or absence detected.

name: Low stock
description: Inventory item reaches threshold.

name: Reorder created
description: Purchase request or reorder suggestion is created.

name: Stockout
description: Inventory item is unavailable.

name: Maintenance due
description: Machine maintenance threshold reached.

name: Downtime started
description: Machine is marked down.

name: Downtime resolved
description: Machine is active again.

name: Campaign created
description: Marketing campaign draft is created.

name: Campaign approved
description: Campaign is approved and ready to send.

name: Campaign launched
description: Campaign run starts.

name: Campaign completed
description: Campaign run is completed.

name: Campaign failed
description: Campaign cannot continue due to provider, quota, or validation issue.

name: Trial ending
description: Tenant trial period is near end.

name: Subscription renewal due
description: Tenant subscription renewal approaches.

name: Subscription payment failed
description: Tenant subscription payment fails.

name: Plan limit reached
description: Tenant reaches plan quota.

name: Plan limit warning
description: Tenant is near quota limit.

name: Login detected
description: New login or unusual login is detected.
default_recipients: User, Tenant Admin if policy requires

name: Role changed
description: User role or permission changes.

name: Password changed
description: Password or credentials changed.

name: Suspicious activity
description: Risky action detected.

name: Maintenance scheduled
description: Scheduled maintenance is announced.

name: Maintenance started
description: Maintenance window starts.

name: Maintenance completed
description: Maintenance completed.

name: WhatsApp provider degraded
description: WhatsApp provider failure or degraded performance.
default_recipients: Platform Admin, Tenant Admin if impacted

name: SMS provider degraded
description: SMS provider failure or degraded performance.
default_recipients: Platform Admin, Tenant Admin if impacted

name: Queue backlog high
description: Notification queue backlog crosses threshold.

name: Workflow stage intake entered
description: Order or item enters intake stage.

name: Workflow stage preparing entered
description: Order or item enters preparing stage.

name: Workflow stage sorting entered
description: Order or item enters sorting stage.

name: Workflow stage pretreatment entered
description: Order or item enters pretreatment stage.

name: Workflow stage washing entered
description: Order or item enters washing stage.

name: Workflow stage drying entered
description: Order or item enters drying stage.

name: Workflow stage finishing entered
description: Order or item enters finishing stage.

name: Workflow stage assembly entered
description: Order or item enters assembly stage.

name: Workflow stage qa entered
description: Order or item enters qa stage.

name: Workflow stage packing entered
description: Order or item enters packing stage.

name: Workflow stage ready entered
description: Order or item enters ready stage.

name: Workflow stage out_for_delivery entered
description: Order or item enters out_for_delivery stage.

name: Workflow stage delivered entered
description: Order or item enters delivered stage.

name: Workflow stage closed entered
description: Order or item enters closed stage.

name: Campaign recipient opened
description: Campaign recipient opened event is received from provider or app.

name: Campaign recipient clicked
description: Campaign recipient clicked event is received from provider or app.

name: Campaign recipient bounced
description: Campaign recipient bounced event is received from provider or app.

name: Campaign recipient unsubscribed
description: Campaign recipient unsubscribed event is received from provider or app.

name: Campaign recipient complained
description: Campaign recipient complained event is received from provider or app.

name: Campaign recipient converted
description: Campaign recipient converted event is received from provider or app.
